name: Elite Ops - New Blood - Arknights
description:
(NOT A FORCED DOCTOR POV BOT) Writing this on my phone at work, do not expect quality. Will fix later. Basic premise is you are a new member of RI's Elite Ops, or maybe an old one just now returning? Who knows. Will probably also add a second intro for christmas with the Elite Ops. Epic training montage music added for all your training needs. (A cover, not the original, couldn't license it lol)

First intro has dialogue written for a few Elite Ops, but I am not satisfied with the dialogue (my head hurts and I cannot write good dialogue) so the second intro is the same as the first just without the EO dialogue.

Let me know what you all think and if you have any issues with the bot. I will try to get the proper free-form RI bot out by Christmas. Let me know if you have any requests for the RI bot. Also, in my discord (which you can find in my bio) I am taking submissions of people's Arknights OCs to include in an alt version of the RI bot
creator: Cattomic
